title: Ultraman Infinity
description: Transform into iconic Ultraman heroes with 3D models, unique abilities, beam attacks, vehicles, and epic animations in Minecraft!
body:
Ultraman Mod

MzaiB's Bilibili: https://space.bilibili.com/13017834
Bilibili Gameplay: https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV15U6BBvEnH/?share_source=copy_web&vd_source=336fc11ef8478019fd913a1da19a7e3b
YouTube Gameplay: https://youtu.be/BLAhrkbs-wY?si=xEcpvCrzRu5esL_5

Experience the power of Ultraman in Minecraft! Transform into iconic Ultra Heroes from the legendary tokusatsu franchise by Tsuburaya Productions. Battle with unique abilities, unleash devastating beam attacks, pilot legendary vehicles, and explore new dimensions — all with stunning 3D models and animations.


15 Playable Ultra Heroes (30+ Forms)

Ultraman (The Original) — The very first Ultra Warrior from the Land of Light who merged with Shin Hayata to protect Earth. Skills: Spacium Beam, Giga Spacium Beam, Ultra Slash (Cutting Wheel), Ultra Barrier, Body Defense, Shoulder Throw, Size Change, Energy Charge

Ultraseven — The intelligence officer from the Land of Light who chose to protect Earth as Dan Moroboshi. Skills: Wide Shot, Emerium Beam, Eye Slugger (Telekinesis), Ultra Barrier, Size Change, Energy Charge (Normal Form and X Form)

Ultraman Jack — The fourth Ultra Brother who merged with Hideki Go after his heroic sacrifice. Skills: Cinerama Shot, Spacium Beam, Ultra Slash, Size Change, Energy Charge

Zoffy — The captain of the Inter Galactic Defense Force and the eldest Ultra Brother. Skills: M87 Beam (the most powerful beam in the Space Garrison), Spacium Beam, Ultra Barrier, Ultra Slash, Size Change, Energy Charge

Ultraman Ace — The Ultra Brother known as the master of beam slicing techniques, who fought against Yapool's Terrible-Monsters. Skills: Metalium Beam, Punch Laser, Ultra Guillotine, Vertical Guillotine, Ultimate Guillotine, Ultra Slash, Ultra Barrier, Size Change, Energy Charge

Ultraman Taro — The sixth Ultra Brother and son of the Father and Mother of Ultra, known for his immense power. Skills: Strium Beam, Ultra Punch, Ultra Dynamite, Cosmo Miracle Beam (ultimate team attack), Size Change, Energy Charge

Ultraman Tiga — The ancient giant of light who awakened after 30 million years, the first Ultra to change forms mid-battle.
  Multi Type: Zeperion Beam, Spacium Beam, Flash Color Timer, Size Change, Energy Charge
  Sky Type: Ranbalt Light Bullet, Heal, Thunder Sprint, Size Change
  Power Type: Deracium Beam Flow, Zeperion Beam (Power), Lightning Fist, Shoulder Throw, Size Change
  Glitter Type: Glitter Zeperion Beam, Glitter Lightning Fist, Glitter Flash Color Timer, Size Change

Ultraman Dyna — The warrior of light who inherited Tiga's legacy, merged with Super GUTS member Shin Asuka.
  Flash Type: Solgent Beam, Size Change, Energy Charge
  Miracle Type: Revolium Wave, High-Speed Movement, Size Change
  Strong Type: Garnate Bomber, Strong Punch, Shoulder Throw, Size Change

Ultraman Trigger — The new generation hero who carries the power of the ancient light, successor to Tiga's legacy.
  Multi Type: Zeperion Beam, Spacium Beam, Flash Color Timer, Size Change, Energy Charge
  Sky Type: Ranbalt Light Bullet, Heal, Thunder Sprint, Size Change
  Strong Type: Deracium Beam Flow, Lightning Fist, Shoulder Throw, Size Change

Ultraman Leo — The martial arts master from Planet L77, trained under Ultraseven. Known as the strongest fighting Ultra. Skills: Leo Kick, Leo Combo Punch, Size Change, Energy Charge

Ultraman Gaia — The embodiment of the will of the Earth itself, bonded with genius physicist Gamu Takayama to defend against the Radical Destruction Bringer.
  V1 Form: Photon Edge, Quantum Stream, Size Change, Energy Charge, Assault Tactics, Shoulder Throw
  V2 Form: + Photon Crusher, Liquidator
  SV Form (Supreme Version): + Photon Stream (all V1/V2 abilities included)

Ultraman Agul — The warrior born from the will of the ocean, bonded with Hiroya Fujimiya. Gaia's rival turned ally. Skills: Photon Crusher, Liquidator, Spiral Assault, Size Change, Energy Charge (3 forms: V1, V2, SV)

Ultraman Max — Known as the strongest and fastest Ultra in the Land of Light. Skills: Maxium Cannon, Galaxy Cannon, Eye Slugger (Telekinesis), Ultra Barrier, Comet Dash (Speed Move), Speed Force, Instant Strike, Size Change

Ultraman Mebius — The youngest Ultra Brother, a rookie warrior who grew through bonds with his human teammates in GUYS. Skills: Mebium Shoot, Mebium Dynamite, Burning Mebius Spin Kick, Ultra Wisdom (Skill Copy System x4 slots), Size Change

Leonixon — The protagonist of Ultra Galaxy Mega Monster Battle, a Reionics warrior who can control monsters. Features Normal and Rage forms with unique rage transformation mechanics.


Vehicles and Mechs

Space Pendragon — The massive mothership of the defense team, with custom third-person camera
GUTS Wing 1 — Classic GUTS attack aircraft
GUTS Wing 2 — Advanced GUTS fighter jet
Plasma Type 100 — High-tech plasma-powered combat vehicle
Sherlock Car — Defense team ground transport


Key Features

Transformation System with epic 3D animated sequences
Ability Wheel UI for intuitive skill selection and switching
Experience and Level System to unlock new abilities progressively
Form Switching between different combat forms mid-battle
Custom Dimension: Land of Light with unique skybox rendering
3D GeckoLib Models with emissive glow effects (eyes, color timer)
Player Animations via Player Animator for smooth combat and transformation
Custom Sound Effects for authentic Ultraman experience
Blocks and Items including Plasma Spark Tower and transformation devices
Advancement and Recipe Systems


Requirements

Minecraft 1.21.1
NeoForge 21.1.209+
GeckoLib 4.7+ (Required)
Player Animator 2.0+ (Required)


Credits

Project Lead: M仔B
Programmers: M仔B / BenNiao_Eric / 小戴wear
Modelers: M仔B / 艾卡斯特 / 是鲨发不是沙发 / Dr-观星 / 雲崎不是云 / 元宵儿儿儿 / 坤首人 / 软胶贩子路基艾尔 / 饭桶魔兽 / 金子円玖
Builders: 张思睿33 / 平力的晓吉 / 银小武
Special thanks to the 特补制作组 team!

IMPORTANT: This mod is completely FREE. If you paid for it anywhere, you have been scammed.
Author: M仔B | Search "M仔B" on Bilibili for the official download.
